case_title: VYACHESLAV AVERBACH VS. TORGSYN JEWELRY & ANTIQUES

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TORGSYN JEWELRY & ANTIQUES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVERBACH, VYACHESLAV IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TORGSYN JEWELRY & ANTIQUES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
